description: Build and submit one iOS app to App Store

userStories.title: Trend research + idea selection
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: rank, idea, one_liner, platform, problem_statement, target_user, feasibility, overall_score, monetization_model, competition_notes, mvp_scope, next_step
At least 5 ideas evaluated, top 1 selected
userStories.notes: Selected: EyeRest (20-20-20 eye care timer). Score 8.2. Competition: Eye Care 20 20 20 (365 reviews, 4.34 rating). 26 raw ideas generated across 5 lenses. 5 shortlisted. Evidence: spec/01-trend.md exists, all 13 fields present, 5 ranks, 20+ sources cited.

userStories.title: Product planning
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: target user, problem, solution, monetization, MVP scope
monetization section specifies subscription prices (monthly + annual)
curl itunes.apple.com/search for APP_NAME returns 0 exact name matches
userStories.notes: product-plan.md created with 7 sections, 13 sources (29 URLs). Pricing: $4.99/mo + $29.99/yr. App name 'EyeRest' verified unique (0 exact matches via iTunes API 2026-03-07). Bundle ID: com.aniccafactory.eyerest. MVP: 13 must-have features, 10 won't-have with PROHIBITED reasons. Competitors: Eye Care 20 20 20 (365 reviews, 4.34) + 6 others analyzed.

userStories.title: Market research
userStories.notes: competitive-analysis.md: 7 competitors profiled (3 direct + 4 indirect), 15-cell feature matrix, 21 star-1-2 reviews analyzed, pricing analysis with positioning map. market-research.md: TAM $181.6M (bottom-up), SAM $27.2M, SOM Y1 $2,720 / Y3 $54,400. POEM score 20/25 (Strong Opportunity). 17 sources cited across both files. Negative signal documented: niche may be too small for subscription.

userStories.title: Core Spec (PRD, ARCHITECTURE, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE)
acceptanceCriteria: docs/PRD.md exists and contains app_name, bundle_id, subscription prices
docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md exists and references RevenueCat SDK (not Mock)
userStories.notes: PRD.md (229 lines): 14 sections, 13 Feature IDs (F-001 to F-013), app_name/bundle_id/prices present, free_tier_limit defined. ARCHITECTURE.md (390 lines): 12 sections, MVVM + Protocol DI, RevenueCat only dependency, no prohibited SDKs. IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md (489 lines): 8 sections, 6-phase breakdown, Purchases.shared.purchase(package:) referenced, Fastfile lanes. All Gate 1/2/3 checks PASS. AC-1 to AC-25 all PASS. Rule 17/20/20b/23 violations = 0.

userStories.title: UX Spec (UX_SPEC, DESIGN_SYSTEM, TEST_SPEC, RELEASE_SPEC)
userStories.notes: UX_SPEC.md (340 lines): 9 sections, 2 personas, IA diagram, 3-tab navigation, 6 ASCII wireframes, 3-act onboarding flow, 60+ accessibilityIdentifiers, 9 localization pairs. DESIGN_SYSTEM.md (213 lines): 7 sections, 5 brand + 10 semantic colors, 3 gradients, 10-style typography scale, 8pt spacing scale, 10 reusable components, 21 SF Symbols, 11 animations with haptics, WCAG AA contrast. TEST_SPEC.md (235 lines): 7 sections, 37 unit tests + 8 integration + 6 E2E Maestro flows = 51 total, Greenlight checks (Rules 17/20/20b/23), performance targets. RELEASE_SPEC.md (260 lines): 11 sections, en-US + ja metadata (PRD §14 match), 4 screenshots per locale, 22 age rating items (all NONE), signing config, TestFlight plan, hotfix protocol. Gate 2 all PASS. Gate 3 all 13 Feature IDs traced. Rule violations = 0. Total: 2609 lines across 7 docs (target 1300+).

userStories.title: Spec Review (all 7 documents)
acceptanceCriteria: code-quality-reviewer agent (.claude/agents/) — NOT codex-review skill, NOT Codex CLI run on all 7 docs
userStories.notes: code-quality-reviewer agent executed on all 7 docs. Initial: 5 CRITICAL, 8 WARNING, 5 SUGGESTION. All 5 CRITICAL fixed: C-1 BreakSession fatigueLevel removed (data in FatigueEntry only), C-2/W-8 NotificationServiceProtocol + TimerServiceProtocol added (Protocol DI consistent), C-3 fireImmediateBreakNotification() added (no timeInterval:0 crash), C-4 Components/ directory added (10 reusable components), C-5 contrast usage rules documented (brand colors large-text only). All 8 WARNING fixed: W-1 background/foreground transition strategy with targetFireDate, W-2 test count 32+ → 37+, W-3 missing test files added (8 total), W-4 free-tier interval behavior clarified, W-5 Phase Breakdown aligned with sections, W-6 PaywallView dismissal context-dependent, W-7 badge text uses text.primary. Re-verification: Gate 1/2/3 PASS, Rule 17/20/20b/21 PASS, 2717 lines total (target ≥ 1300), CRITICAL = 0.

userStories.title: Privacy Policy + ASC app creation
acceptanceCriteria: privacy-policy.md exists and deployed to GitHub Pages
App created in ASC (APP_ID recorded in .env)

userStories.title: IAP + pricing + RevenueCat setup
acceptanceCriteria: asc subscriptions groups list --app $APP_ID returns 1+ groups
asc subscriptions list --group $GROUP_ID returns monthly + annual products
asc subscriptions prices list --id $MONTHLY_ID returns 175 prices
SPM dependency on RevenueCat added (RevenueCatUI prohibited -- Rule 20)

All flows use id: selectors (no point: selectors)
